title: Blockchain and Distributed Ledger Technology
description: Study of blockchain technology covering cryptographic foundations, consensus mechanisms, smart contracts, and decentralized applications. Topics include hash functions, digital signatures, Bitcoin protocol, Ethereum and smart contracts (Solidity), consensus algorithms (PoW, PoS, PBFT), decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain scalability solutions. CS201 prerequisite provides data structures knowledge (hash tables, trees) essential for understanding blockchain data structures (Merkle trees, hash chains).
topics: Consensus: Proof of Work, Proof of Stake, PBFT
Merkle trees and blockchain data structures
outcomes: Write and deploy smart contracts in Solidity
Analyze blockchain security and attack vectors
